content: This started happening a month or two ago. If the game sound stopping completely when you go to another program is intended, can you please make it an option in settings? I'd love to hear the music when I'm looking things up but I'd rather have it completely muted than for it to start and stop over and over
hello, which platform you're on? PC or Steam?
steam
is it possibly something with my steam settings?
a friend has it happen as well so I assumed it was for everyone

I have the same issue too
也是steam🥺有次更新完就這樣了~~一直忘記要回報問題~~，都找不到地方設定
It is an option in settings, I had forgotten about that. It just doesn't work
Do you mean that you have tried this option and it doesn't work?
Yes
I've restarted it a few times and it doesn't change anything
Got it, I'll report to the team and will give you updates in time.❤️
Thank you!

content: 我在使用Morimens时遇到问题，每当我尝试打开它时，都会弹出窗口，这种情况已经持续了5个小时了。
可以湮滅掉敵人嗎？
湮了他
Bug越長越多
連深海都可以湮滅人了
這個可以考慮之後做進去角色裡  敵方小怪低於X% 湮滅可選擇該目標使用
湮了之後超維回合放出來

Hi. Today i update the app on my mobile phone but when I logged in with my google account, the game started all over from the beginning, as if I didn't had a morimens account before... ;-; Maybe it's a bug but I don't know...
Furthermore, i noticed that I have 2 apps of morimens: one written in English and the other one in japanese/chinese
I remember that steam account differ from mobile phones'. These twe are not able to read player's ac from each other.
I don't have a steam account tho
well, you might use guest mode then(? or some issues happened and recommended you to attach  service staff
Like shouldn't i just have one app?
No i was logged in with a google account
If it was, contact the service staff may be the best, I think 🤔
Ok thank you very much for the help, should I contact them here in discord or through mail?
Maybe i could pin them here?
I think this fine cause' you had posted Questions here
<@1168738854837166162> <@&1166257943742787615> Hi, sorry to disturb but I'd like you to read this chat when you can, thank you <:wish:1236951537788649492>
Is account binded? If so try deleting the game entirely and reinstalling.
I did it but it created me a new account, as if i didn't had a google account connected with the morimens account
But i have it tho (i also have screen of the code)

U may find it in User center

Hit the cog wheel in main screen  "account" than "user center"
I found the code but still created me a new account...

I have the ID number (which is 
10000245 - name: Kei) and this code in the pic which i think is the one associated with my google account. This happens when i log in the app written in japanese. If i log in in the app written in english ("morimens") whith the same google account, i get a different code ("66...."). Just a note: i don't hava a Qookka acc but a SIALIA GAMES one, i don't know if might be important...
Ya weird. Best to wait for a staff to come around. I would even send an email or Facebook them
Yeah, i pinned them in the chat, and hope to solve this issue...
